critical.issue: Decision-matrix code examples use non-existent React API shapes. Lines 46-50 show `<TabList value={activeTab}>...<Tab value="buy">...</Tab>...</TabList>` as top-level JSX components, but the actual API (per ./components/tablist.md and ./components/tab.md) is `Tabs.Root` / `Tabs.List` / `Tabs.Trigger` with value state owned by `Tabs.Root`. Same for lines 58-63: `<SegmentedControl value={size}>...<SegmentedControl.Item value="S">` — the actual API is `<SegmentedControl.Root value={size} aria-label="...">...<SegmentedControl.Indicator />...`. Lines 104-106 repeat the same `<TabList>/<Tab>` mistake. This directly violates the project's core AI-slop avoidance goal: a decision matrix that points users toward tablist.md/segmented-control.md should not contradict those docs with code snippets that cannot compile against `@seed-design/react`. Any reader following this matrix will produce broken code.
critical.suggestion:
Rewrite the code blocks (L45-51 and L57-64 and L103-107) to match the actual namespace API:
- `<Tabs.Root value={activeTab} onValueChange={setActiveTab}><Tabs.List><Tabs.Trigger value="buy">구매</Tabs.Trigger>...</Tabs.List>...</Tabs.Root>` (plus `Tabs.Indicator` inside List, plus `Tabs.Content` siblings per tablist.md).
- `<SegmentedControl.Root value={size} onValueChange={setSize} aria-label="사이즈"><SegmentedControl.Indicator /><SegmentedControl.Item value="S">S</SegmentedControl.Item>...</SegmentedControl.Root>`.
Also update prose references to 'TabList + Tab' (lines 10, 11, 28, 38, 42, 88, 104-107, 118, 130, 137) so the component naming matches the Tabs namespace used in tablist.md/tab.md.

high.issue: L62: `tablist.md ← TabList 컨테이너 (콘텐츠 전환, 가로 스크롤 지원)`. The component doc itself (tablist.md L8) describes the React API as `Tabs.List` inside `Tabs` namespace; there is no top-level `TabList` export. 'TabList 컨테이너' is a holdover from the deprecated naming used in which-tab.md and is inconsistent with the actual ported API.
high.suggestion: Change to something like `tablist.md ← Tabs namespace (Root/List/Trigger/Indicator/Content) — 콘텐츠 전환, 가로 스크롤 지원` so index description matches tablist.md content.

high.issue: Prose throughout the file uses 'TabList' / 'Tab' as if they were distinct top-level components (lines 10, 11, 28, 38, 42, 88, 104-107, 118, 130, 137). The comparison table row L28 `[**Tabs** (TabList + Tab)](../components/tablist.md)` suggests two separate components; but tablist.md describes a single `Tabs` namespace with `Root/List/Trigger/Indicator/Content` slots. This mismatch propagates naming confusion into decision trees and anti-pattern corrections.
high.suggestion: Replace 'TabList + Tab' composition wording with 'Tabs namespace (Tabs.Root + Tabs.List + Tabs.Trigger + Tabs.Indicator + Tabs.Content)'. Update L42 bullet to read 'tablist.md — Tabs namespace (Root/List/Trigger/Indicator/Content)'. Keep which-tab.md as a single-source-of-truth that agrees with tablist.md.

medium.issue: Anti-pattern #5 (L258-263) lacks a concrete ❌ code example. Lines 259-262 are a multi-line comment explaining the rule and L263 is just a bare `❌` on its own line after a trailing blank line. A reader skimming the ❌ blocks will not see a code snippet illustrating the forbidden pattern; all other anti-patterns in this file have an accompanying JSX block.
medium.suggestion:
Replace the bare `❌` marker with an actual forbidden snippet, e.g.:
```tsx
❌ // Root export 형태로 destructuring — 금지
import { Root, Item, Indicator } from "@seed-design/react/SegmentedControl";
<Root defaultValue="a" aria-label="정렬">
  <Indicator />
  <Item value="a">A</Item>
</Root>
```
Alternatively, move the explanatory comment above the code block so the structure matches anti-patterns 1-4.

medium.issue: L116-119 ChipTabs warning says 'Rootage upstream 에는 ChipTabs 가 존재하지만 현재 components/ 폴더에 문서가 없다' and suggests checking `packages/rootage/components/chip-tabs.yaml`. However the file path format elsewhere in the project is already more uniform and mentions aren't tied to a reproducible local path; may add minor confusion as the rootage dir isn't cloned in this repo. This is stylistic — not blocking.
medium.suggestion: Either verify rootage clone path exists or rephrase to 'upstream seed-design rootage spec' (no local path claim).

medium.issue: L165-172 Props block imports `TabsVariantProps` inline-commented as `size: "small" | "medium"; triggerLayout: "hug" | "fill"`. This duplicates what the Variants tables already list; minor cohesion issue. More importantly, `TabsPrimitive.RootProps` is referenced but the actual published upstream type export names (subject to upstream SHA 1f1d21d) should be double-checked against @seed-design/react source tree — if upstream uses `TabsPrimitive` namespace from a different package path, readers may get TS errors.
medium.suggestion: Low-priority: add a brief note near L167-172 indicating these type names come from `@seed-design/react` (matching how checkbox.md / radio-group.md phrase it), and optionally mirror the variant keys in a dedicated `TabsVariantProps` type literal rather than as a free-form comment.

low.issue: L346-348 anti-pattern comment ('native status bar 와 혼동 — TopNavigation 은 status bar 영역을 포함하지 않음') is a free-form comment without code example. Consistent with the doc's overall style but slightly out of pattern vs the rest of ❌ blocks.
low.suggestion: Optional: remove the bare ❌ with just a comment or rewrap as a plain bullet in a separate 'Do not confuse' section.

low.issue: L394 imports 4 symbols from `@seed-design/react` on one line: `List, Icon, IconPersonCircleFill, IconChevronRightFill`. Icon assets in this skill's canonical BYO pattern come from `@karrotmarket/react-monochrome-icon` (see icon.md L188), not from `@seed-design/react`. list-item.md example (b) therefore documents an import path that may not exist in user projects.
low.suggestion: Split imports to match icon.md BYO guidance: `import { List, Icon } from '@seed-design/react'; import { IconPersonCircleFill, IconChevronRightFill } from '@karrotmarket/react-monochrome-icon';`. Mirror this in examples (b) and (d) and the Anti-pattern #3 GOOD block on L312.

low.issue: L42 and L107 import `SuffixIcon` from `@seed-design/react`. Verify upstream SHA 1f1d21d actually exports `SuffixIcon` at top level as a named export (it is listed in icon.md as one of the slot components). Minor — semantically correct per icon.md.
low.suggestion: No action unless upstream verification shows otherwise.

summary: Review found 1 CRITICAL (which-tab.md code examples use non-existent API — TabList/Tab/SegmentedControl as top-level JSX tags instead of the actual Tabs.Root/Tabs.List/Tabs.Trigger and SegmentedControl.Root/Item namespace API), 2 HIGH (naming inconsistency between which-tab.md / index.md and the actual tablist.md Tabs-namespace API), plus 3 MEDIUM and 3 LOW. Common rule A/B/C checks all pass (wrapping names appear exactly 4 times in list-item.md warning box, frontmatter status/deprecated flags correct, no deep-path icon imports remain in checkbox.md). Sync script L97 passes --check. C1 verified (top-navigation classified rootage-only by sync --json).
